role_authority_matrix.note: Enforced across 3 layers: UI + API/Edge Functions + Database RLS
role_authority_matrix.super_role_permissions: Full access to all modules and user management
role_authority_matrix.manager_role_permissions: View analytics, approve workflows, manage team
role_authority_matrix.user_management_authorization: Only ADMIN_ROLES (admin, ceo, coo, director) can create/edit/delete users

enforcement_points.database_rls: auth_role() PostgreSQL function maps ceo/coo → admin for all RLS policies

critical_modules.description: Executive overview with KPIs, sales funnel, construction progress, cross-module stats
features: Real-time KPI widgets (units sold, revenue, construction %)
Sales funnel breakdown (new leads, visits, loans, approvals, transfers)
Construction progress by status (not started, in progress, completed)
Pending approvals breakdown by workflow type
AI chat assistant (AVIVA AI) for data queries
Cross-module statistics (receipts, expenses, employees, claims, documents)
Revenue vs Expense vs Profit chart
critical_modules.test_required: Verify all KPIs load correctly; test AI chat responses; validate permissions for manager vs staff

critical_modules.description: Customer Relationship Management for leads, customers, and sales pipeline
features: Lead tracking with visit_date, visit_time, reported_by fields
Lead status pipeline (New, Hot, Warm, Cool, Approved, Transferred)
critical_modules.test_required: Test lead creation/edit; verify visit datetime fields save correctly; test customer portal access

critical_modules.description: Track construction progress by house/unit status and contractor performance
features: Construction progress by unit (completed, in-progress, not-started)
Inspector QC checklist and defect tracking
House/unit detail view (plot number, model, land size, progress %, status)
Delayed unit tracking with days overdue
critical_modules.test_required: Verify progress calculations; test photo upload/storage; validate contractor scorecard sign-off workflow

critical_modules.description: Financial workflows, expense approvals, maker-checker validation
features: Approval workflow with maker-checker enforcement (submitter ≠ approver)
Petty cash system with transaction tracking
critical_modules.test_required: Test approval workflows with correct roles; verify threshold enforcement; test receipt scanner
Verify report data accuracy; test filtering and date ranges; validate export functionality

critical_modules.description: Central approval queue for all pending workflows
features: Approval route bar showing authority chain
Approval logs with timestamp and submitter tracking
critical_modules.test_required: Test approval workflow transitions; verify maker-checker constraint; validate audit logs

critical_modules.description: Employee records, leave management, personnel tracking
critical_modules.test_required: Verify employee data integrity; test leave request workflows
Verify accounting entries; test reconciliation workflows

features: Document sequence numbering (FIN, PO, WR, INST, LEAVE, MKTG, BOOK, DOC)
critical_modules.test_required: Verify document numbering sequences; test search functionality

critical_modules.description: System configuration, user management, project settings
features: User management (create, edit, delete via admin-user-management edge function)
Project information (units, revenue targets, construction progress)
critical_modules.test_required: Test user creation/editing/deletion; verify permissions; test LINE integration

optional_modules.description: AI briefing generation and expert insights
System-wide activity tracking and audit logs
Sales lead management and pipeline tracking

sql_queries_template.note: Run these queries on Supabase production database after backup

DEMO_ACCOUNT_BACKUP.description: Export all demo accounts before deletion
DEMO_ACCOUNT_BACKUP.query: SELECT id, email, user_metadata, app_metadata, created_at, last_sign_in_at FROM auth.users WHERE email LIKE 'demo.%' OR email LIKE 'ceo.test%' ORDER BY created_at;

DEMO_ACCOUNT_COUNT.description: Verify exact count of demo accounts to delete
DEMO_ACCOUNT_COUNT.query: SELECT COUNT(*) as demo_account_count FROM auth.users WHERE email LIKE 'demo.%' OR email LIKE 'ceo.test%';

VALIDATE_EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE.description: Check that all employees have required fields
VALIDATE_EMPLOYEE_STRUCTURE.query: SELECT id, email, user_metadata->>'full_name' as full_name, app_metadata->>'role' as role, app_metadata->>'department' as department, created_at FROM auth.users WHERE email NOT LIKE 'demo.%' AND email NOT LIKE 'ceo.test%' ORDER BY created_at;

FIND_ORPHANED_APPROVALS.description: Check for approvals with deleted users
FIND_ORPHANED_APPROVALS.query: SELECT a.id, a.submitted_by_user_id, a.approved_by_user_id, a.workflow_type FROM approvals a WHERE a.submitted_by_user_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth.users WHERE id = a.submitted_by_user_id) OR a.approved_by_user_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth.users WHERE id = a.approved_by_user_id);

FIND_ORPHANED_ACTIVITY_LOGS.description: Check for activity logs referencing deleted users
FIND_ORPHANED_ACTIVITY_LOGS.query: SELECT al.id, al.user_id, al.action FROM activity_logs al WHERE al.user_id IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM auth.users WHERE id = al.user_id);

VALIDATE_ROLE_CONSISTENCY.description: Check that roles in app_metadata and user_metadata match
VALIDATE_ROLE_CONSISTENCY.query: SELECT id, email, user_metadata->>'role' as user_meta_role, app_metadata->>'role' as app_meta_role FROM auth.users WHERE (user_metadata->>'role') IS DISTINCT FROM (app_metadata->>'role');

DOCUMENT_NUMBER_INTEGRITY.description: Verify document number sequences have no gaps
DOCUMENT_NUMBER_INTEGRITY.query: SELECT doc_type, COUNT(*) as count, MAX(doc_number) as max_number, MIN(doc_number) as min_number FROM documents GROUP BY doc_type ORDER BY doc_type;

VERIFY_RLS_POLICIES.description: List all RLS policies to ensure they're properly configured
VERIFY_RLS_POLICIES.query: SELECT schemaname, tablename, policyname, permissive, roles, qual, with_check FROM pg_policies WHERE schemaname = 'public' ORDER BY tablename, policyname;

CHECK_MAKER_CHECKER_CONSTRAINT.description: Verify no approval where submitter == approver
CHECK_MAKER_CHECKER_CONSTRAINT.query: SELECT id, submitted_by_user_id, approved_by_user_id FROM approvals WHERE submitted_by_user_id = approved_by_user_id AND action_taken IN ('Approved', 'Rejected');

query_set: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_users FROM auth.users;
SELECT COUNT(*) as demo_users FROM auth.users WHERE email LIKE 'demo.%' OR email LIKE 'ceo.test%';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_leads FROM leads;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_approvals FROM approvals;
SELECT COUNT(*) as pending_approvals FROM approvals WHERE action_taken = 'Pending';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_documents FROM documents;
SELECT COUNT(*) as construction_units FROM construction_progress;

SELECT role, COUNT(*) as count FROM (SELECT (COALESCE(app_metadata->>'role', user_metadata->>'role', 'unassigned')) as role FROM auth.users WHERE email NOT LIKE 'demo.%' AND email NOT LIKE 'ceo.test%') GROUP BY role ORDER BY role;

tasks: QA team completes smoke testing of all modules
Security review of RLS policies and user permissions
Data quality validation (run SQL queries template)
Admin deploys final code to staging (claude/move-work-location-2CfBA branch)
Full UAT (User Acceptance Testing) with business stakeholders
Delete all 9 demo accounts from production auth.users
Run npm run build on final code
Send go-live notification to all users
Create deploy report with version, time, and changes

critical_risks.title: Demo accounts not fully deleted
critical_risks.impact: Security breach, unauthorized access, data exposure
mitigation: Backup auth.users table before deletion
Use admin-user-management edge function or Supabase dashboard UI
Verify with SQL query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM auth.users WHERE email LIKE 'demo.%' OR email LIKE 'ceo.test%';
Confirm count = 0 before go-live

critical_risks.title: Maker-checker constraint not enforced
critical_risks.impact: Approvals can be self-approved, financial fraud risk
mitigation: Test with SQL: SELECT * FROM approvals WHERE submitted_by_user_id = approved_by_user_id AND action_taken IN ('Approved', 'Rejected');
Should return 0 rows
Run trigger enforce_approval_maker_checker test in staging

critical_risks.title: RLS policies not blocking access correctly
critical_risks.impact: Users can access data they shouldn't (other departments, customers)
mitigation: Test as staff user: cannot see other user's approvals
Test as finance user: cannot access construction records
Test as CEO: can access all modules
Run UAT with production data sample

critical_risks.title: Build fails due to TypeScript errors
mitigation: Run npm run build on final code before go-live
Fix any TypeScript errors (field missing, type mismatch)
Verify no console errors in browser DevTools

critical_risks.title: API rate limiting or quota exceeded
mitigation: Monitor Supabase usage dashboard
Optimize query patterns to reduce unnecessary calls
Configure appropriate rate limits in edge functions

critical_risks.title: Data loss during migration/backup
mitigation: Full backup before any destructive operations
Test backup restoration on staging
Document backup location and recovery procedure

recommended_actions_before_go_live: 2. Run all SQL queries from sql_queries_template
3. Conduct full UAT with sample production data
4. Backup production database and verify restoration
6. Run npm run build and confirm success
8. Delete demo accounts and verify count = 0
9. Monitor application 24/7 for first 48 hours post-launch

support_contacts.note: Update with actual contact information before distribution

first_24_hours: Monitor error logs in browser console and Supabase logs
Check application performance metrics (load time, response time)
Check for any orphaned records in database
Verify document numbering sequences continue correctly
first_week: User feedback collection from all departments
Performance optimization based on usage patterns
success_criteria: Zero demo accounts visible in login screen
All 9 core modules functional and accessible
No data loss or corruption reported
All users able to complete their workflows

notes_and_special_instructions.aviva_plus_separation: AVIVA Plus (resident/guard portal) is completely separate from AVIVA ONE. No AVIVA Plus code (proxy.ts, security/*, community/v*) should be in this codebase.
notes_and_special_instructions.version_format: vX.X.X (major.minor.patch) — current is v6.34; next deploy should be v6.35 or higher
notes_and_special_instructions.supabase_auth_structure: Role stored in auth.users.app_metadata.role (source of truth) with fallback to user_metadata.role
notes_and_special_instructions.approval_thresholds: Finance approval authority: Manager (50K) → Director (500K) → CEO/COO (unlimited)
notes_and_special_instructions.database_realtime: PostgreSQL Realtime enabled for real-time dashboard updates
notes_and_special_instructions.notification_system: Push notifications and LINE webhook integration; dismiss tracking records in database
